description: CompositionBlack pullover made of 70% acrylic and 30% wool, has a mock neck with a zipper front, long sleeves, adidas patented 3-Stripes across the chest and sleeves, and brand badge over the left hemFittingComfortWash careWash below 40 degrees separatelyDo not dry cleanDo not soak, bleach or tumble dryDry in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decoartionsEnjoy the winter in comfort in this acrowool pullover from adidas.
